name: Meta AI
description: Meta AI — Meta's consumer AI assistant powered by Llama, integrated across Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp.

seo.title: Meta AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Meta AI: Meta AI — Meta's consumer AI assistant powered by Llama, integrated across Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp.

when_to_use: Running open-weight Llama 3 models for self-hosted inference
Fine-tuning Llama on proprietary data for domain adaptation
Building multimodal AI apps with Llama's vision capabilities
Accessing state-of-the-art open LLMs without API costs
Deploying code generation with Code Llama in CI/CD pipelines

pros: Zero-setup access inside Meta's social apps
Backed by the Llama model family
Free at the point of use for end users
cons: Feature gaps vs ChatGPT and Gemini
Privacy concerns due to Meta data surface
review.verdict: Useful as a distribution surface inside Meta apps, not a developer platform today.
review.best_for: End users already living inside Facebook, Instagram and WhatsApp
review.not_for: Developers — use Llama directly or route via Groq, Together, Fireworks
